creator: pav@FreeBSD.org
text:
> This probably belongs on it's own page:
> 
>    FreeBSD/amd64 Project -- Laptops
> 
> Where we could list the supported Laptops, and known work arounds to get FreeBSD/amd64 installed on them.

http://gerda.univie.ac.at/freebsd-laptops/index.pl?action=list_laptop_mf&mfid=9

Would this site do? Or I can add it to a separate laptop table at the
bottom of Motherboards page. What do you prefer?

-- 
Pav Lucistnik <pav@oook.cz>
              <pav@FreeBSD.org>

Crucifixion? Good. Out of the door, line on the left, one cross each. Next!
